system.description: Mutant nightkin that take on a variety of appearances. Some with snouts and tusks, or fur and horns, or those with calloused and verdigris skin. They typically settle in close-knit tribes where “might is right”, and have been known to establish themselves as commanders over goblin warbands.

traits.name: Darksight
traits.description: You are not Blinded by Dark.

traits.name: Beefy
traits.description: You make Saves against being Grappled or Shoved with Favor, and have Favor on Checks to Grapple or Shove.

traits.name: Hulking
traits.description: You have a +2 bonus to Item Slots.

system.description:
In a way, we are magicians. We are alchemists, sorcerers and wizards. We are a very strange bunch. But there is great fun in being a wizard.

— Billy Joel

Students of the arcane arts, researchers and developers of spells as academic pursuit.

Iconic Wizards

  • Harry Dresden, The Dresden Files
  • Merlyn, Arthurian legend
  • Sparrow, Earthsea series
  • Sypha Belnades, Castlevania

Playing Wizard

The wizard is a squishy blaster focused on Casting Spells. Stay in safety to Cast your Spells and discover Enemy weaknesses.

Action: Cast
Move: Backline
Starting Perk: Astronomer or Mage
Key Stat: Reason
Complexity: ★★★★☆

Training

Weapons —
Skills: Arcana, and 4 others

levelFeatures.name: Spellcaster
levelFeatures.description:
You can Cast Spells using Arcana.

Spells: You learn 4 Spells. You learn 1 other Spell every 2 Wizard Levels hereafter.

Mana: Your Maximum Mana is equal to (4 × your Wizard Level), and the highest amount of Mana you can spend to Cast a Spell is equal to (Reason + half your Wizard Level, round up). You regain spent Mana when you Rest or Study.

levelFeatures.name: Sculpt Spell
levelFeatures.description: You pay 1 less Mana for Spell delivery.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new perk, you do not need to meet the Prerequisite to benefit from it.

levelFeatures.name: Page Master
levelFeatures.description: You gain the Bookworm Perk (p. 67). Additionally, when you successfully Cast a Spell, you can spend one of your Studied dice and add it to the damage or healing roll.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new perk, you do not need to meet the Prerequisite to benefit from it.

levelFeatures.name: Manifold Mind II
levelFeatures.description: You can Focus on up to three Spells at the same time.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new perk, you do not need to meet the Prerequisite to benefit from it.

levelFeatures.name: Extracurricular
levelFeatures.description: When you Cast, you can spend a Studied die to cast any one Spell with that Casting, even if it isn’t a Spell you know.

levelFeatures.name: Manifold Mind
levelFeatures.description: You can Focus on up to two Spells at the same time. When you become an 8th Level Wizard, you can Focus on up to three Spells at the same time.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new perk, you do not need to meet the Prerequisite to benefit from it.

levelFeatures.name: Archwizard
levelFeatures.description: You pay 2 less Mana for Spell delivery.

effects.name: lv2 - Sculpt Spell
effects.description: You pay 1 less Mana for Spell delivery.

effects.name: lv.10 - Sculpt-Spell
effects.description: You pay 2 less Mana for Spell delivery.

system.description: You gain an extra Studied die when you Study (p. 19). You can take this Perk multiple times.
When the Check passes, and each time you Focus on the Cast for the duration, you can cause the Target to loudly and coherently repeat everything you mentally command them to. They are otherwise mute.

You animate an Item that occupies no more than 1 Slot in the Area or carried by the Target. For the duration, the Item gains a Speed of 30' (Fly), and uses the Object Armor & HP rules (p. 12) for its Stats. It obeys your commands, which you can issue when you Focus on this Spell. If it is a Weapon, it can make Attacks using your Cast Skill.

You shoot an unsecured Target of 1 or less HD or Slots at a Target you can see within Near. If it strikes a Target, it hits them harmlessly unless this is Cast to deal damage.

You can spend Mana to increase the Targetable HD or Slots by 1 per Mana spent to do so for that Casting.
The Target is Confused for the duration.

Leather, hide, padded.

Equipping Armor

Equipping or unequipping Armor requires a Scene (10 minutes) to complete.
